finding_results.notes: Replaced euphemistic touch language with explicit anatomy-specific contact, preserved ongoing verbal consent checks, retained and clarified on-page adjustment for discomfort/constraints (position change and cramp pause), and carried the sequence through both climaxes without summary skip.

Added an observable external social consequence at dawn (Mrs Cain witnessing the scene, including visible intimacy marks) and an immediate tactical decision/action on-page (coordinated flood/alibi setup and explicit public explanation before chapter close).

Removed abstract self-diagnosis phrasing about coping and rendered fear through concrete behavior and friction: clipped logistics exchange, counted packing, wrist interception, repeated clothing adjustment, supply counting, and resource-check actions.
Replaced the recurring laugh-dies affect beat with a blackout-specific pressure cue (wax-scraping/cold-body stress behavior) tied to immediate survival calculus.

summary: All four packet findings were addressed in-place with minimal collateral churn: intimacy rendering is now concrete and embodied, fear beats are dramatized through behavior rather than explanation, the opening affect tic is replaced with a distinct blackout-survival cue, and the ending now includes immediate external consequence plus tactical response before the final image.
